criteria.description: Skeleton smoke tests pass on the merged mission branch.
criteria.evidence: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_skeleton.py -q -> 28 passed in 2.73s
criteria.notes: Covers the mission's executable acceptance contract, including the real seed_dim_metric path and hpipe console-script invocation.

criteria.description: The full pytest suite passes with the lane fixes merged into the mission branch.
criteria.evidence: uv run python -m pytest -q -> 53 passed in 30.55s
criteria.notes: Confirms the lane fixes do not regress the existing test suite.

criteria.description: Shipped parser contract docs match the mutable PluginParseResult implementation.
criteria.evidence: Reviewed merged commit a956a05: src/premura/parsers/CONTRACT.md and src/premura/skills/parser-generator/SKILL.md now describe PluginParseResult as a mutable dataclass with rationale matching src/premura/parsers/base.py.
criteria.notes: Clears the prior contract drift that caused the earlier rollback.
